subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the desired One! Cling to the hem of His most pure garment, detach thyself from all else save God, and take shelter beneath the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت مقصود دست بذیل اطهر زن و از ما سوی الله منقطع شو و در ظل شجره
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
